prompt: Create a complete CSS color system using custom properties (CSS variables) for a SaaS dashboard with blue as the primary brand color. Include everything the app would need: primary shades, neutral greys, and semantic colors. Output a single self-contained HTML file that defines the variables and shows swatches.
assertions: All color values use hsl() notation exclusively (not hex or rgb)
Defines at least 5 distinct shades of the primary blue (light to dark, e.g. 100 through 700)
Includes a neutral grey scale with at least 4 shades
Includes semantic colors: at least success/green and danger/red
